name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax offers same-day title loans and secured lines of credit using vehicle titles as collateral, with locations across multiple states including Tennessee.
description_long:
TitleMax is a title loan lender operating since at least 2007, with the Memphis Summer Avenue location established in February 2007. The company specializes in providing fast cash solutions to consumers who need emergency funds quickly. TitleMax operates physical store locations across 11 states (AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, and WI) and offers both in-store and online application options.

The company's primary product is title pledges—secured loans where borrowers use their vehicle title as collateral while retaining driving privileges. TitleMax also offers a Flex Line of Credit product, which functions as a flexible secured line of credit tied to vehicle equity. Additionally, they provide unsecured personal lines of credit for customers who may not want to pledge their vehicle title. All products emphasize quick approval and same-day cash funding.

TitleMax distinguishes itself through several operational features: they accept most credit types (not solely credit-score dependent), maintain bilingual services at this location, offer competitive rates, and allow customers to keep driving their vehicles while the title is pledged. The company also provides flexible repayment structures and dedicated customer service. The Memphis location shows strong customer satisfaction with a 5.00/5 average rating across 481+ Google reviews, with multiple customer testimonials praising specific staff members for professionalism and knowledge.

As a title lender, TitleMax fills a genuine market need for consumers facing genuine financial emergencies who have limited traditional lending options. However, borrowers should understand that title loans typically carry higher interest rates than traditional bank loans, and defaulting on a title pledge can result in vehicle repossession. The loan products are designed for short-term emergency cash needs rather than long-term financial solutions.
address: 805 W Wade Hampton Blvd, Greer, SC 29650

company_info.headquarters: 805 W Wade Hampton Blvd, Greer, SC 29650

pros: Same-day cash funding available upon approval
Accepts most credit types; credit score is not the primary qualification factor
Customers keep their vehicle and retain driving privileges while title is pledged
Bilingual services available at this location
Flexible repayment options including Flex Line of Credit with variable withdrawal capability
Established local presence (Memphis location since February 2007)
Consistently high customer satisfaction (5.00/5 rating, 481+ reviews) with praise for staff professionalism
cons: Title loans typically carry higher interest rates than traditional bank loans, though rates are described as 'competitive'
Vehicle repossession risk if payments are not maintained
Requires clear vehicle title and current vehicle registration, limiting accessibility to some consumers
Short-term loan product designed for emergencies, not suitable for long-term financial needs
In-store and online personal loan portals are managed separately, which may create customer confusion
best_for: Consumers with urgent cash needs (under $1,000-$5,000) who have clear vehicle title and own a vehicle with equity
Borrowers with poor credit or limited credit history who are declined by traditional lenders
People who need emergency funds within hours and can manage short-term loan repayment
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for consumers facing genuine financial emergencies who own a vehicle with clear title and cannot qualify for traditional bank loans. The main caveat is that title loans carry significantly higher costs than conventional financing; borrowers should carefully evaluate repayment ability before pledging their vehicle, as default can result in losing transportation.
services: Vehicle title pledges with same-day cash funding
Flex Line of Credit secured by vehicle title
Unsecured personal lines of credit (online and in-store)
Quick approval process with most credit types accepted
Vehicle valuation assessment for loan qualification
Flexible payment structures with adjustable repayment schedules
